creator: andy@icc.surw.chel.su
text:
This is a patch to update information about The FreeBSD Russian Documentation Project. Anyone, who has some additional info about Russian translations, contact me at andy@icc.surw.chel.su. --- translations.sgml Fri Mar 19 20:00:10 1999 +++ /home/andy/translations.sgml Sat Mar 20 10:36:50 1999 @@ -81,13 +81,17 @@

The FreeBSD Russian Documentation Project

Web: http://surw.chel.su/~andy/index.html
-E-Mail: Andrey Zakhvatov <andy@cgu.chel.su>
+E-Mail: Andrey Zakhvatov <andy@icc.surw.chel.su>
Documents available
-
- FAQ +
FAQ +
QA
+
Documents currently at working
+
WWW
+
Handbook
+

The FreeBSD Spanish Documentation Project

Fix: Please, check and commit this patch.
